name: Duluth Holdings Inc.
description: Duluth Holdings Inc. is a lifestyle brand of men's and women's casual wear, workwear, and accessories sold primarily through its Duluth Trading Company brand. The company offers a wide range of products, including shirts, pants, underwear, outerwear, footwear, and tools, designed with proprietary features and outstanding durability. Duluth Holdings markets its products through an omnichannel model, combining its robust e-commerce platform and direct-mail catalogs with a growing network of retail stores across the United States.
